name: Another Earth: Gaming Grid
description: Another Earth: Gaming Grid is a delightful virtual world, empowering players to be creators with the tools to expand the universe. In this ever-evolving world, our goal is for players to craft their own stories and meaningful experiences for others.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-12100 (4 Core / Threads 8)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060TI
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
